channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — June 13, 2026
item.description: Good morning. Tensions continue to simmer across the Middle East despite signs of a potential US-Iran peace deal, while Ukraine presses allies for more aid amidst escalating drone warfare, including the controversial use of autonomous systems. In Eur...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 11, 2026
item.description: Tensions in the Gulf have escalated significantly, with the United States and Iran exchanging strikes and a critical oil tanker incident unfolding near Oman. Domestically, US inflation figures have risen, a development President Trump has commented o...

item.title: The VENCAst — June 07, 2026
item.description: Ukrainian drone attacks target Russian territory deep within its borders, striking near St. Petersburg and oil depots. In the Persian Gulf, a fragile ceasefire between the United States and Iran is tested by a new exchange of strikes, raising concern...
